title: Lively Ukrainian Walnut Grill
description: A smoky, nutty grilled dish featuring toasted walnuts and pickled cucumber, brightened with canola oil and paprika. This savory snack showcases Ukrainian flavors in a quick, easy format.
instructions: Preheat the robata grill to medium‑high heat (around 200°C).
In a bowl, combine walnuts, smoked paprika, dried dill, minced garlic, salt, pepper, and lemon juice.
Toss the walnuts in the canola oil until lightly coated.
Spread the walnut mixture evenly on a heat‑proof baking sheet that fits your grill.
Place the sheet on the grill grates and cook for 8 minutes, stirring occasionally.
While the walnuts are roasting, sauté the sliced red onion in a little canola oil until golden.
Once the walnuts are nutty and fragrant, remove the sheet and transfer the walnuts to a serving bowl.
Add the diced nuka-pickle, sautéed onion, and a drizzle of remaining canola oil on top of the walnuts.
Garnish with fresh dill and serve immediately as a side or snack.
